title: Scope-aware list/ready output for multiple projects
description: When multiple project/ directories are discovered, list/ready should group or prefix with project path to disambiguate.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Scope-aware list/ready output implemented in python/src/taskulus/issue_listing.py and rust/src/issue_listing.rs by tagging issues with project_path for multi-project outputs.
